Gladys Ramos

Full Stack Web Developer

I am an executive recruitment specialist transitioned into a Full Stack Web Developer. Driven by high-efficiency workflows, I design modern web applications utilizing the MERN stack ecosystem to build robust backend systems and completely responsive frontend user designs.

My Projects

E-commerce API Documentation

Dynamic E-Commerce Workflow Management. The system features dynamic routes for order processing, real-time inventory updates, and secure user authentication. Documented Backend API published publicly using Postman.

Course Booking API Documentation

RESTful API for managing course enrollments, featuring user registration, authentication, and retrieval of user details. Supports course creation, updates, and student enrollment. Publicly documented using Postman.

Course booking App

A MERN-stack course enrollment system featuring user registration, authentication, and profile management. Platform allows users to browse available courses and enroll seamlessly.

E-commerce App

MERN E-Commerce Platform. Features a dynamic product catalog with filtering, sorting, real-time search, seamless cart updates, secure checkout, and a comprehensive admin dashboard.

Airline Booking System Mockup

Side Project: Conceptual design showcasing an intuitive UI for flight search, seat selection, and booking confirmation, focusing on user experience and workflow efficiency.

Airline Booking System Prototype

Side Project: Interactive prototype simulating end-to-end airline booking functionalities, including flight search, reservation, payment processing, and real-time ticket management.

Short Courses Capstone

Integrating front-end components with a highly scalable RESTful API back-end solution to serve modular learning resource pathways.

Short Courses Capstone

Fully functional dashboard component managing course paths, filtering structures, and registration states.

Short Courses Capstone

Authentication flows, secure sessions, and custom responsive layouts designed with native Bootstrap components.
